columns.description: str, Open edX Course ID formatted as course-v1:xPro+{course code}+{run_tag}

columns.name: coursestructure_content_hash
columns.description: str, sha256 hashed string of the course content.

columns.name: coursestructure_block_content_hash
columns.description: str, sha256 hashed string of the block content in a course

columns.name: coursestructure_block_id
columns.description: str, Unique ID for a distinct piece of content in a course, formatted as block-v1:xPro+{course}+{run}type@{block type}+block@{hash code}

columns.name: coursestructure_parent_block_id
columns.description: str, parent block ID, same format as block_id

columns.name: coursestructure_block_index
columns.description: int, sequence number giving order in which this block content appears within the course

columns.name: coursestructure_block_category
columns.description: str, category/type of the block, it identifies core structural elements of a course. Value includes but not limited to course, chapter, sequential, vertical, discussion, html, problem, video, etc.

columns.name: coursestructure_block_title
columns.description: str, title of the block extracted from the metadata of the block. This field comes from name field for the section, subsection, or unit on the Studio 'Course Outline' page.

columns.name: coursestructure_block_metadata
columns.description: str, json string of the metadata field for the block. It provides additional information about this block, different block type may have different member fields inside metadata.

columns.name: courserun_title
columns.description: str, title of the course extracted from the metadata of 'course' block

columns.name: courserun_start_on
columns.description: timestamp, indicating when the course run starts extracted from the metadata of 'course' block

columns.name: coursestructure_retrieved_at
columns.description: timestamp, indicating when this course structure was initially retrieved from REST API.

columns.name: coursestructure_chapter_id
columns.description: str, block id of chapter within which this child block belongs to. Null for the 'course' block as it's the top block that doesn't belong to any chapter.

columns.name: coursestructure_chapter_title
columns.description: str, title of chapter within which this child block belongs to.

columns.name: coursestructure_is_latest
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course content is the latest version

schema_snapshot.description: This table contains historical changes to xPro's course content.

columns.name: user_username
columns.description: str, username of the open edX user who caused the event to be emitted.

columns.name: openedx_user_id
columns.description: int, open edX user ID extracted from context field

columns.name: courserun_readable_id
columns.description: str, Open edX Course ID formatted as course-v1:xPro+{course code}+{run_tag}

columns.name: useractivity_event_source
columns.description: str, specifies the source of the interaction that triggered the event. The value is server for the discussion events.

columns.name: useractivity_event_type
columns.description: str, type of discussion forum event triggered. Values can be edx.forum.comment.created, edx.forum.comment.edited, edx.forum.response.created, edx.forum.response.voted, edx.forum.thread.created, edx.forum.thread.viewed, edx.forum.thread.voted, edx.forum.searched, etc. A list of discussion events can be found https://edx.readthedocs.io/projects/devdata/en/latest/ internal_data_formats/tracking_logs/student_event_types.html#discussion-forum-events

columns.name: useractivity_path
columns.description: str, relative url path of page that generated this discussion event. e.g. for edx.forum.response.voted events, it indicates if this event is unvote or upvote

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_post_id
columns.description: str, unique identifier for the discussion post learner engaged in. May be Null for edx.forum.searched event

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_post_title
columns.description: str, title for the specific discussion post. May be Null for edx.forum.searched event.

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_block_id
columns.description: str, identifier for the specific discussion component. e.g. discussion_ps2A-tab5. Value is the last part of 'coursestructure_block_id' string. May be Null for edx.forum.searched event.

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_block_name
columns.description: str, display name for the specific discussion component. This value consists of the unit name and 'coursestructure_block_title' of this discussion component.

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_page_url
columns.description: str, URL of the page from which the discussion thread can be viewed.

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_search_query
columns.description: str, the query text searched by the learner on the course discussion page. Applicable for edx.forum.searched event.

columns.name: useractivity_discussion_roles
columns.description: array, Identifies a user who doesn't have discussion management privileges as a 'Student', or a user who has discussion management privileges as a course 'Community TA', 'Moderator', or 'Administrator'. The value of role refers to name field in django_comment_client_role_users. https://edx.readthedocs.io/projects/devdata/en/latest/internal_data_formats/sql_schema.html#id12

columns.name: useractivity_timestamp
columns.description: timestamp, time when this event was emitted

schema_snapshot.description: MIT xPro learners discussion forum interaction within a course

columns.description: str, transaction identifier from most recent cybersource payment for the order

columns.description: numeric, actual discount dollar amount. For percent-discount coupon, this is calculated as line_price * percentage off

columns.name: ticket_id
columns.description: int, primary key for the ticket

columns.name: ticket_api_url
columns.description: str, the API url of the ticket

columns.name: ticket_tags
columns.description: array, the array of tags applied to this ticket.

columns.name: ticket_type
columns.description: str, the type of this ticket. Possible values are "problem", "incident", "question", or "task".

columns.name: ticket_status
columns.description: str, the state of the ticket. Possible values are "new", "open", "pending", "hold", "solved", or "closed".

columns.name: ticket_description
columns.description: str, first comment on the ticket

columns.name: ticket_priority
columns.description: str, the urgency with which the ticket should be addressed. Possible values are "urgent", "high", "normal", or "low".

columns.name: ticket_subject
columns.description: str, the subject/title of the ticket

columns.name: ticket_source_channel
columns.description: str, the channel through which the ticket was created. e.g. "web", "email

columns.name: ticket_source_email
columns.description: str, source email address of the ticket

columns.name: ticket_source_rel
columns.description: str, the relationship of the source channel to the ticket. e.g. "follow_up

columns.name: ticket_source_ticket_id
columns.description: str, the ID of the source ticket, if this ticket is a follow-up to another ticket.

columns.name: brand_name
columns.description: str, the name of the brand associated with the ticket

columns.name: group_name
columns.description: str, the name of the group associated with the ticket

columns.name: ticket_is_public
columns.description: bool, whether this ticket is publicly visible

columns.name: ticket_recipient_email
columns.description: str, the original recipient e-mail address of the ticket.

columns.name: ticket_requester
columns.description: str, the name of the requester of the ticket.

columns.name: ticket_submitter
columns.description: str, the name of the submitter of the ticket.

columns.name: ticket_assignee
columns.description: str, the name of the assignee of the ticket.

columns.name: ticket_followers
columns.description: array, the name of users currently following this ticket

columns.name: ticket_collaborators
columns.description: array, The name of users who are collaborators on this ticket.

columns.name: organization_name
columns.description: str, the name of the organization associated with the ticket

columns.name: ticket_has_incidents
columns.description: bool, true if a ticket is a problem type and has one or more incidents linked to it. Otherwise, the value is false.

columns.name: ticket_satisfaction_rating_score
columns.description: str, the satisfaction rating score of the ticket. e.g. "good", "bad", "offered".

columns.name: ticket_satisfaction_rating_comment
columns.description: str, the satisfaction rating comment of the ticket

columns.name: ticket_satisfaction_rating_reason
columns.description: str, the satisfaction rating reason

columns.name: ticket_is_from_messaging_channel
columns.description: bool, true if the ticket's via type is a messaging channel.

columns.name: ticket_custom_fields
columns.description: array, custom fields for the ticket. e.g. [{"MicroMasters Program":"supply_chain_management"},{"Ticket Type":"course_information"}]

columns.name: ticket_due_at
columns.description: timestamp, if this is a ticket of type "task" it has a due date.

columns.name: ticket_unix_timestamp
columns.description: int, a unix timestamp that represents the most accurate reading of when this record was last updated. It is updated for all ticket updates, including system updates.

columns.name: ticket_created_at
columns.description: timestamp, the time when the ticket was created

columns.name: ticket_updated_at
columns.description: timestamp, the time when the ticket was last updated

columns.description: str, comment relationship to the ticket.

columns.name: comment_via_object
columns.description: object, the via object describes how or why the object was created.

columns.description: int, the unix time comment was created

columns.name: opportunity_id
columns.description: string, globally unique string that identifies an opportunity

columns.name: opportunity_name
columns.description: string, name for the opportunity

columns.name: opportunity_type
columns.description: string, opportunity type - Existing Business, Expansion Business, New Business

columns.name: opportunity_business_type
columns.description: string, string, indicating business type - B2C (Business to Consumer), B2B (Business to Business) or B2X (Business-to-Exchange). B2X is inactive. There are also other possible values e.g. 3rd Party – B2C

columns.name: opportunity_agreement_type
columns.description: string, type of Agreement. Possible values - 3rd Party Hosted, Additional MSA Order Form, Affiliate Direct, Affiliate via Intermediary, Bulk Sales, Content Licensing, Master Service Agreement, Membership, Private Course (SPOC), Reseller, Self-Pay Opp, Subscription, Training Broker, Underwriting, Workshop

columns.name: opportunity_revenue_share_or_commission_contract
columns.description: boolean, indicating if MIT will have to pay a fee or commission to another party because of this opportunity

columns.name: opportunity_revenue_share_or_commission_amount
columns.description: decimal, actual $ amount of revenue share/commission once it has been calculated for this opportunity

columns.name: opportunity_mit_is_sales_lead
columns.description: boolean, indicating if MIT is the lead (or unsupported sales) in opportunity for 3rd party hosted sales

columns.name: opportunity_stage
columns.description: string, current stage of the opportunity. Some examples - Closed Won, Closed Won, Enrollment List, Contracting, Demo, Order, Prospecting, Connecting, etc

columns.name: opportunity_leadsource
columns.description: string, source of the opportunity, such as Advertisement, Partner, or Web

columns.name: opportunity_nextstep
columns.description: string, next step noted for this opportunity

columns.name: opportunity_has_lineitem
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the opportunity has product line item

columns.name: opportunity_amount
columns.description: decimal, estimated total sale amount in US dollar

columns.name: opportunity_probability
columns.description: int, percentage of the likelihood that opportunity will close - 0 to 100 (0 means Closed/Lost, 100 means Closed/Won)

columns.name: opportunity_is_won
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the opportunity is a closed-Won sale

columns.name: opportunity_is_closed
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the opportunity is a closed sale, which can be Closed-Lost or Closed-Won

columns.name: opportunity_close_date
columns.description: date, close date for the opportunity

columns.name: opportunity_num_enrollment_codes_redeemed
columns.description: int, sum of enrollment codes redeemed

columns.name: opportunity_num_of_seats_purchased
columns.description: int, number of Seats purchased

columns.name: opportunity_price_per_seat
columns.description: int, price per seat, it's calculated Amount / of_Seats_Purchased__c in US dollar

columns.name: opportunity_data_quality_score
columns.description: int, data quality score between 0 to 100

columns.name: opportunity_data_quality_description
columns.description: string, description for data quality score

columns.name: opportunity_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when this record was created

columns.name: opportunity_modified_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when a user or automated process last modified this record

columns.name: courserun_title
columns.description: str, title of the course run on the corresponding platform. May be null for small amounts of courses from edX.org

columns.name: courserun_start_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the course run begins. May be Null.

columns.name: courserun_end_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the course run ends. May be Null.

columns.name: courserun_upgrade_deadline
columns.description: timestamp, date and time beyond which the learner can not enroll in paid course mode. Only populated for MITx Online and MicroMasters course runs.

columns.name: courserun_is_live
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the course run is available to users on MITx Online and xPro. Null for Bootcamps and edx.org.

columns.name: course_number
columns.description: str, unique string for the course. It can contain letters, numbers, or periods. e.g. 6.002.1x

columns.name: courserun_is_current
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course run is currently running. True if courserun_start_on is in the past and blank courserun_end_on, or courserun_start_on is in the past and courserun_end_on is in the future.

schema_snapshot.description: Intermediate combined model for courses and runs from different platforms

columns.name: platform
columns.description: str, open edx platform, e.g., MITx Online, edX.org, xPro, Residential MITx.

columns.name: courserun_readable_id
columns.description: str, the open edX course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag} for MITxOnline and xPro courses, {org}/{course}/{run_tag} for edX.org courses

columns.name: coursestructure_block_id
columns.description: str, Unique ID for a distinct piece of content in a course, formatted as block-v1:{org}+{course}+{run}type@{block type}+block@{hash code}

columns.name: coursestructure_parent_block_id
columns.description: str, parent block ID, same format as block_id

columns.name: coursestructure_block_index
columns.description: int, sequence number giving order in which this block content appears within the course

columns.name: coursestructure_block_category
columns.description: str, category/type of the block, it identifies core structural elements of a course. Value includes but not limited to course, chapter, sequential, vertical, discussion, html, problem, video, etc.

columns.name: coursestructure_block_title
columns.description: str, title of the block extracted from the metadata of the block. This field comes from name field for the section, subsection, or unit on the Studio 'Course Outline' page.

columns.name: coursestructure_block_metadata
columns.description: str, json string of the metadata field for the block. It provides additional information about this block, different block type may have different member fields inside metadata.

columns.name: courserun_title
columns.description: str, title of the course extracted from the metadata of 'course' block

columns.name: coursestructure_retrieved_at
columns.description: timestamp, indicating when this course structure was initially retrieved from S3

columns.name: coursestructure_chapter_id
columns.description: str, block id of chapter within which this child block belongs to. Null for the 'course' block as it's the top block that doesn't belong to any chapter.

columns.name: coursestructure_chapter_title
columns.description: str, title of chapter within which this child block belongs to.

schema_snapshot.description: this table contains the latest course structure of the courses from MITx Online ,xPro, edX.org and Residential MITx.

columns.name: platform
columns.description: open edx platform, e.g., MITx Online, edX.org, xPro, Residential MITx.

columns.name: courserun_readable_id
columns.description: str, the open edX course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag} for MITxOnline and xPro courses, {org}/{course}/{run_tag} for edX.org courses.

columns.name: video_id
columns.description: str, hash code for the video. This value is the last part of video_block_id string.

columns.name: video_edx_id
columns.description: str, the video ID on the open edx platform. edx_video_id extracted from the video metadata.

columns.name: video_block_id
columns.description: str, Unique ID for the video, formatted as block-v1:{org}+{course}+{run}type@{block type}+block@{hash code}

columns.name: video_parent_block_id
columns.description: str, parent block ID, same format as block_id.

columns.name: video_index
columns.description: int, sequence number giving order in which the video appears within the course

columns.name: video_title
columns.description: str, title of the video extracted from the metadata of the block. This field comes from name field for the section, subsection, or unit on the Studio 'Course Outline' page.

columns.name: video_metadata
columns.description: str, json string of the video metadata, e.g., display_name, edx_video_id

columns.name: chapter_id
columns.description: str, block id of chapter within which this video belongs to.

columns.name: chapter_title
columns.description: str, title of chapter this video belongs to.

columns.name: video_duration
columns.description: float, the length of the video, in seconds. May be 0.0.

schema_snapshot.description: this table contains video structure and metadata for MITx Online, xPro , edX.org and Residential MITx courses.

columns.name: course_uuid
columns.description: str, unique identifier for the OCW course

columns.name: course_name
columns.description: str, unique name of the OCW course. It appears as part of OCW Studio urls

columns.name: course_readable_id
columns.description: str, short unique identifier for the OCW course. e.g. 18.05-spring-2022 The source of this field is short ID of the website.

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: str, title of the OCW course

columns.name: course_source
columns.description: str, indicating which courses were imported and which ones were authored in the app. Possible values are 'studio', 'ocw-import', or blank

columns.name: course_url_path
columns.description: str, unique URL relative path to the OCW course website. e.g., courses/my-site-fall-2020. For draft courses, it can be used to preview on https://draft.ocw.mit.edu/

columns.name: course_live_url
columns.description: str, URL of the OCW course on production.

columns.name: course_is_live
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course website is currently published on OCW production.

columns.name: course_is_unpublished
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course website is currently unpublished on OCW production.

columns.name: course_has_never_published
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course website has never been published on OCW production.

columns.name: course_first_published_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course website was first published to OCW production

columns.name: course_publish_date_updated_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the publish date was most recently updated on OCW production. The publish date is updated by the webhook to Concourse pipeline (it rebuilds every site) whenever we do a release in ocw repos.

columns.name: course_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course record was created

columns.name: course_updated_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course record was last updated

columns.name: course_description
columns.description: str, course description on OCW website

columns.name: course_term
columns.description: str, course term. Possible values are Spring, Summer, Fall, January IAP, or blank

columns.name: course_year
columns.description: int, course year

columns.name: course_level
columns.description: str, course level in comma-separated list. Possible values are Undergraduate , Graduate, Non-Credit, High School, or blank

columns.name: course_primary_course_number
columns.description: str, the primary course number e.g. 21A.850J

columns.name: course_extra_course_numbers
columns.description: str, the extra course number e.g. STS.484J

columns.name: course_department_numbers
columns.description: str, course department numbers in comma-separate list. e.g. STS, 8.. The department name is available in int__ocw__course_departments.

columns.name: course_topics
columns.description: json, hierarchical course topics (topic, subtopic, speciality) in json format. The unnested version of this data is available in int__ocw__course_topics. e.g. [["Mathematics","Discrete Mathematics"],["Mathematics","Probability and Statistics"]]

columns.name: course_learning_resource_types
columns.description: str, course learning resource types or features in comma-separated list. e.g. Lecture Notes, Problem Sets with Solutions,... Full list https://github.com/mitodl/ocw-hugo-projects/blob/049c85e6544a36ba69a89602e5014f6085ef8831/ ocw-course-v2/ocw-studio.yaml#L163-L207

schema_snapshot.description: After the dedp micromasters was divided into two tracks the rules for which DEDP program the user can apply 14.009x Good Economics for Hard Times are as follows 'If you completed 14.009x Good Economics for Hard Times before the launch of the Public Policy Track in fall 2023, you can apply the course to the International Development Track indefinitely. However, if you completed 14.009x before fall 2023 and wish to apply it to the Public Policy Track, it cannot be counted towards the International Development Track. In this case, you will need to complete two other International Development Track electives excluding 14.009x) and the three core courses to earn the International Development credential. Starting from fall 2023, completing 14.009x will only be credited towards the Public Policy Track.' Users can recieve both DEDP certificates but only count 14.009x once

columns.description: str, Open edX Course Key e.g. course-v1:org+course+run (for new-type courses) or org/course/run (for old-type courses)

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: int, user ID on Residential xPro open edx platform

columns.name: grading_policy_hash
columns.description: str, A SHA-1 digest of the course grading policy, used to detect and update grades whenever the policy changes

columns.name: percent_grade
columns.description: float, calculated course grade as a decimal percentage, per grading policy. e.g. 0.91 means 91%

columns.name: letter_grade
columns.description: str, calculated course grade as a letter value (e.g., A-D, Pass), per grading policy If the learner's grade is Fail or F, this value is empty.

columns.name: passed_timestamp
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the learner first passed the course. If this value is empty, the learner never passed the course. If this value is non-empty but the letter_grade value is empty, the learner transitioned from passing to not passing.

columns.description: int, foreign key to auth_user from open edX platform

columns.name: usage_key
columns.description: str, block ID of the subsection (sequential) - foreign key to course_structure. e.g. block-v1:{org}+{course}+{run}type@{block type}+block@{hash code}

columns.name: earned_all
columns.description: float, The user's aggregated "total_weighted_earned" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_earned" values of all (graded and ungraded) problems in the subsection.

columns.name: possible_all
columns.description: float, the aggregated "total_weighted_possible" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_possible" values of all (graded and ungraded) problems in the subsection.

columns.name: earned_graded
columns.description: float, The user's aggregated "total_weighted_earned" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_earned" values of all "graded" problems in the subsection.

columns.name: possible_graded
columns.description: float, The aggregated "total_weighted_possible" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_possible" values of all "graded" problems in the subsection.

columns.name: first_attempted
columns.description: timestamp, time of the user's first attempt at a problem in the subsection.

columns.name: created
columns.description: timestamp, datetime of the subsection grade was first calculated for this user for this subsection.

columns.name: modified
columns.description: timestamp, datetime of the subsection grade was last updated for this user for this subsection. It will be updated every time the user attempts the problem.

For DEDP runs on edX.org or DEDP runs on MITx Online in '3T2021', '1T2022', '2T2022', these are paid and verified in MicroMasters. For other DEDP courses that run on MITx Online, they are paid and verified in MITx Online

columns.name: coupon_code
columns.description: string, coupon code for the coupon

columns.name: coupon_name
columns.description: string, human readable name for the coupon payment

columns.name: coupon_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the coupon was initially created

columns.name: payment_transaction
columns.description: string, string that identifies the payment invoice for coupon purchases by companies. This will be null for records sourced from b2b.

columns.name: discount_amount
columns.description: string, either dollar amount off or percentage discount. If the data is coming from b2b it is always a percentage.

columns.name: coupon_type
columns.description: string, one of 'single-use' or 'promo'. Promo coupon codes can be used multiple times. This will be null for records sourced from b2b.

columns.name: discount_source
columns.description: string, one of "staff", "marketing", "credit_card", "purchase_order", "sales". "staff" coupons are used to allow staff to enroll in courses. "marketing" coupons are promos for discounts generated by marketing. "credit_card", "purchase_order" and "sales" correspond to different ways that companies can pay for vouchers for their employees to enroll in courses or programs. This will be null for records sourced from b2b.

columns.name: activated_on
columns.description: timestamp, activation timestamp for the coupon payment version

columns.name: expires_on
columns.description: timestamp, expiration timestamp for the coupon payment version

columns.name: coupon_source_table
columns.description: string, either "ecommerce_coupon", "b2bcoupon". "ecommerce_coupon" coupons are sourced from the int__mitxpro__ecommerce_coupon table and are used to recieve a discount on a course or program. "b2bcoupon" coupons are sourced from the int__mitxpro__b2becommerce_b2bcoupon table and represent a coupon used by a business which can include many individuals.

columns.name: b2bcoupon_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to b2becommerce_b2bcoupon.

columns.name: coupon_id
columns.description: int, foreign key referencing ecommerce_coupon. This will be null for records sourced from b2b.

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_num_coupon_codes
columns.description: int, number of coupon objects associated with the payment version

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_max_redemptions
columns.description: int, maximum number of redemptions for the coupon payment version

columns.name: couponpayment_name
columns.description: string, human readable name for the coupon payment

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to ecommerce_couponpaymentversion for orders that use a coupon

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the coupon payment version was initially created

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_discount_amount_text
columns.description: string, discount amount in readable format. It can be percent-off which is <dollar amount * 100>% off, dollars-off which is $<dollar amount> off

columns.name: company_name
columns.description: string, company name

columns.name: b2border_contract_number
columns.description: string, contract number used to identify the order

columns.name: b2breceipt_reference_number
columns.description: str, transaction reference number from cybersource payment

columns.name: coupons_used_count
columns.description: int, count of coupons used by coupon payment name

columns.name: product_readable_id
columns.description: string, the product identifier either referring to courserun_readable_id, programrun_readable_id, or program_readable_id. Might be null for unredeemed coupons.

columns.name: redeemed
columns.description: boolean, set to true if the coupon has at least one redeemed order otherwise it's false.

schema_snapshot.description: B2B and regular coupons combined into one table

Certificates earned for courses that satisfy the requirements for multiple programs appear in multiple rows for each program

columns.name: end_date
columns.description: date, the aggregate statistics in this report are calculated for all enrollments that occured and certificates that were earned prior to this date. Monthly + the latest date

columns.name: program_title
columns.description: str, Micromasters program tile

columns.name: total_enrollments
columns.description: int, count of course enrollments in the program. This includes users who later unenrolled from the course

columns.name: unique_users
columns.description: int, count of unique users who took courses in the program. We use email to identify mitxonline and edxorg users who are the same person so this may count some users twice if they used different emails for their edxorg and mitxonline accounts

columns.name: unique_countries
columns.description: int, count of unique countries of enrolled users

columns.name: verified_enrollments
columns.description: int, count of verified (paid) enrollments in the program's courses.

columns.name: unique_verified_users
columns.description: int, count of unique verified users enrolled in the program's courses. Email is used to dedupe users accross mitxonline and edxorg so this number might be slightly higher than the actual since some users may use  differnt email addresses for their edxorg and mitxonline logins

columns.name: course_certificates
columns.description: int, count of course certificate earned for the courses in the program

columns.name: unique_course_certificate_earners
columns.description: int, count of unique users who earned a certificate for one of the program's courses. Email is used to dedupe users accross mitxonline and edxorg so this number might be slightly higher than the actual since some users may use  differnt email addresses for their edxorg and mitxonline logins

columns.name: program_certificates
columns.description: int, count of program certificates earned for the the program

columns.name: user_hashed_id
columns.description: str, primary key for the combined_users table.

columns.name: user_email
columns.description: string, user email on the corresponding platform including xpro, bootcamps, edX.org, MITx Online, and Residential MITx. If the user is on edX.org and MITx Online then the email will be chosen from the last platform they joined if their account is active. May be null for some xPRO Emeritus learners.

columns.name: user_joined_on
columns.description: timestamp, user join timestamp on the corresponding platform including xpro, bootcamps, edX.org, MITx Online, and Residential MITx. If the user is on edX.org and MITx Online then the timestamp will be chosen from the latest platform they joined if their account is active

columns.name: user_last_login
columns.description: timestamp, user last login on the corresponding platform including xpro, bootcamps, edX.org, MITx Online, and Residential MITx. If the user is on edX.org and MITx Online then the timestamp will be chosen from the latest login if their account is active

columns.name: user_is_active
columns.description: boolean, indicating if user's account is active on the corresponding platform including xpro, bootcamps, edX.org, MITx Online, and Residential MITx. If the user is on edX.org and MITx Online then it will be true if their MITx Online account is active, otherwise it will default to their edX.org account active status.

columns.name: platforms
columns.description: string, application where the data is from

columns.name: user_full_name
columns.description: str, user full name. Very small number of edX.org users have blank full name, their name couldn't be populated from other sources if they don't have their accounts linked on MicroMasters.

columns.name: user_address_country
columns.description: str, country code provided by the user on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_highest_education
columns.description: str, user's level of education

columns.name: user_gender
columns.description: str, Gender selected by the user on their profile on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_birth_year
columns.description: int, user's birth year

columns.name: user_company
columns.description: str, user's company

columns.name: user_job_title
columns.description: str, user's job title

columns.name: user_industry
columns.description: str, user's job industry

columns.name: user_street_address
columns.description: str, street address on user's profile

columns.name: user_address_city
columns.description: str, address city on user's profile

columns.name: user_address_state_or_territory
columns.description: str,  state code or territory on user's profile

columns.name: user_address_postal_code
columns.description: str, postal code on user's profile

columns.name: user_mitxonline_id
columns.description: int, user ID on MITxOnline

columns.name: user_edxorg_id
columns.description: int, user ID on edX.org

columns.name: user_mitxpro_id
columns.description: int, user ID on MITxPRO

columns.name: user_bootcamps_id
columns.description: int, user ID on bootcamps

columns.name: user_mitxonline_username
columns.description: string, username on MITxOnline

columns.name: user_edxorg_username
columns.description: string, username on edX.org

columns.name: user_mitxpro_username
columns.description: string, username on MITxPRO

columns.name: user_bootcamps_username
columns.description: string, username on bootcamps

columns.name: num_of_course_enrolled
columns.description: number, the number of courses learner enrolled based on their emails so this counts as same person if they use the email to register on different platforms

columns.name: num_of_course_passed
columns.description: number, the number of courses learner passed based on their emails so this counts as same person if they use the email to register on different platforms

columns.name: first_course_start_datetime
columns.description: string, year and term from the users first course enrollment

columns.name: last_course_start_datetime
columns.description: string, year and term from the users latest course enrollment

columns.name: number_of_courserun_certificates
columns.description: int, number of course run enrollment certificates associated with the user

columns.name: total_amount_paid_orders
columns.description: int, sum of total orders paid associated with the user

columns.name: latest_income_usd
columns.description: int, the users latest income in usd. Only populated for mitxonline.

columns.name: has_program_certificate
columns.description: boolean, Set to true if the user has recieved a program credential

columns.name: has_dedp_program_certificate
columns.description: boolean, Set to true if the user has recieved a DEDP program credential

schema_snapshot.description: Mart model for users from different platforms

columns.name: combined_orders_hash_id
columns.description: int, primary key for this table. At the grain of order id, line id, and platform.

columns.name: platform
columns.description: string, describes platform associated with the order (edX.org, mitxonline, mitxpro, or bootcamps).

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: int, foreign key for order table. For edX.org, it refers to order table in MicroMasters application.

columns.name: line_id
columns.description: int, foreign key for line table. For edX.org, it refers to line table in MicroMasters application.

columns.name: coupon_code
columns.description: string, discount code for the redeemed coupon if applicable

columns.name: coupon_id
columns.description: int, foreign key referencing ecommerce_coupon or the b2b coupon table. For edX.org, it refers to ecommerce_coupon table in MicroMasters application.

columns.name: b2bcoupon_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to b2becommerce_b2bcoupon

columns.name: b2border_contract_number
columns.description: string, contract number used to identify the order

columns.name: coupon_name
columns.description: string, human readable name for the coupon payment

columns.name: coupon_redeemed_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the coupon was redeemed by the user for for fulfilled or refunded orders

columns.name: coupon_type
columns.description: string, type of the coupon which describes what circumstances the coupon can be redeemed.

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_payment_transaction
columns.description: string, string that identifies the payment invoice for coupon purchases by companies

columns.name: courserun_id
columns.description: int, foreign key in courses_courserun. Null for edX.org.

columns.name: courserun_readable_id
columns.description: string, unique string to identify a course run on the corresponding platform.

columns.name: discount
columns.description: str, discount applied to the order in a readable format. The value is always an amount taken off the list price of the order, e.g., "$100" means $100 was taken off the price. "30%" means the price was reduced by 30%.

columns.name: order_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the order was initially created. If this is a b2b order it will be the timestamp that order was created otherwise it will be when the regular order was created. For edX.org, it is the timestamp that order was created in MicroMasters application.

columns.name: order_reference_number
columns.description: string, order reference number to identify an order in the corresponding application database, e.g., mitxonline-production-20. For edX.org, it refers to the order in MicroMasters application.

columns.name: order_state
columns.description: string, order state. Options are "cancelled", "created", "declined", "errored", "failed", "fulfilled", "refunded", "partially_refunded",  "pending", "review".

columns.name: order_tax_amount
columns.description: numeric, the amount of tax paid. Only applicable for xPro for now.

columns.name: order_tax_country_code
columns.description: str, the country code where the tax was applied. Only applicable for xPro for now.

columns.name: order_tax_rate
columns.description: numeric, the tax rate to apply. Only applicable for xPro for now.

columns.name: order_tax_rate_name
columns.description: string, name of the tax rate assessed. Only applicable for xPro for now.

columns.name: order_total_price_paid_plus_tax
columns.description: numeric, total order amount plus the amount of tax paid. For xPro, this is calculated order_total_price_paid+order_tax_amount. For other platform, this is the same as order_total_price_paid

columns.name: order_total_price_paid
columns.description: number, total order amount

columns.name: order_type
columns.description: str, type of order for example- B2B, B2C, staff, or Boeing

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: int, foreign key for product table. May be null for bootcamps and edX.org.

columns.name: product_readable_id
columns.description: string, the product identifier either referring to courserun_readable_id, programrun_readable_id, or program_readable_id. May be null for bootcamps and edX.org.

columns.name: product_type
columns.description: string, readable product type - either course run or program. May be null for bootcamps and edX.org

columns.name: receipt_authorization_code
columns.description: str, either the authorization code from cybersource payment transaction, or approvalCode from cybersource refund transaction (MITx Online only).

columns.name: receipt_bill_to_address_country
columns.description: string, address country from cybersource payment

columns.name: receipt_bill_to_address_state
columns.description: string, address state from cybersource payment

columns.name: receipt_payment_amount
columns.description: numeric, total amount for the order - req_amount from cybersource payment

columns.name: receipt_payment_currency
columns.description: str, currency used for the order - req_currency from cybersource payment transaction

columns.name: receipt_payment_card_number
columns.description: str, last 4 digits credit card number from cybersource payment transaction

columns.name: receipt_payment_card_type
columns.description: str, name of the card type, card_type_name from cybersource payment transaction, e.g., Visa

columns.name: receipt_payment_method
columns.description: string, payment method from cybersource payment transaction. Value could be 'paypal' or 'card'.

columns.name: receipt_payment_timestamp
columns.description: string, the signed_date_time from cybersource payment transaction

columns.name: receipt_payment_transaction_type
columns.description: string, type of transaction - req_transaction_type from cybersource payment transaction, e.g., sale

columns.name: receipt_payment_transaction_uuid
columns.description: string, unique merchant-generated identifier - req_transaction_uuid from cybersource payment transaction, e.g., 02815b4f08e56882751a043839b7b481

columns.name: receipt_payer_name
columns.description: string, payer name from cybersource payment transaction

columns.name: receipt_payer_email
columns.description: string, payer email address from cybersource payment transaction

columns.name: receipt_payer_ip_address
columns.description: string, payer IP address from cybersource payment transaction

columns.name: receipt_transaction_id
columns.description: string, unique identifier - either transaction_id from cybersource payment or refund transaction, e.g., 3735553783662130706689, OR unique UUID if no payment required.

columns.name: redeemed_email
columns.description: string, email of MITxPRO purchaser

columns.name: req_reference_number
columns.description: string, cybersource req_reference_number from cybersource payment transaction, e.g., mitxonline-production-1

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: numeric, price for the order line item before discount

columns.name: user_email
columns.description: str, user email associated with their account on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to the user table on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_hashed_id
columns.description: str, foreign key to combined_users

schema_snapshot.description: ecommerce regular b2c orders

columns.name: platform
columns.description: string, application where the data is from

columns.name: courserunenrollment_id
columns.description: int, internal ID and foreign key to courserunenrollments on the corresponding platform. Null for enrollments on edX.org.

columns.name: combined_orders_hash_id
columns.description: int, primary key for this table. At the grain of order id, line id, and platform.

columns.name: course_readable_id
columns.description: str, Open edX ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code} for MITx Online, xPro or Residential courses, and {org}/{course} for edX.org courses. May be null for some Bootcamps courses. Examples include MITx/6.00.2x and course-v1:MITxT+14.740x.

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: str, title of the course. May be null for some edX.org and Residential courses

columns.name: courserun_end_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course run ends. May be Null.

columns.name: courserun_id
columns.description: int, primary key representing a single course run on the corresponding platform. Null for course runs from edx.org

columns.name: courserun_is_current
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course run is currently running. True if courserun_start_on is in the past and blank courserun_end_on, or courserun_start_on is in the past and courserun_end_on is in the future.

columns.name: courserun_readable_id
columns.description: str, Open edX course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag} for MITxOnline and xPro courses, {org}/{course}/{run_tag} for edX.org courses

columns.name: courserun_start_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course run starts. May be Null.

columns.name: courserun_title
columns.description: string, title of the course run on the corresponding platform. Maybe blank for a few edX.org runs missing in int__edxorg__mitx_courseruns.

columns.name: courserun_upgrade_deadline
columns.description: timestamp, specifying the date time beyond which users can not enroll in paid course mode

columns.name: courseruncertificate_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course certificate was initially created

columns.name: courseruncertificate_is_earned
columns.description: boolean, indicating if learner has earned the certificate on mitxonline.mit.edu, edX.org or xpro.mit.edu.

columns.name: courseruncertificate_url
columns.description: str, URL to the course certificate for users who earned the certificate on mitxonline.mit.edu, edX.org or xpro.mit.edu.

columns.name: courseruncertificate_uuid
columns.description: str, unique identifier for the certificate on the corresponding platform

columns.name: courserunenrollment_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when the enrollment was initially

columns.name: courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode
columns.description: string, enrollment mode for user on the corresponding platform

columns.name: courserunenrollment_enrollment_status
columns.description: string, enrollment status for users whose enrollment changed on the corresponding platform

columns.name: courserunenrollment_is_active
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the enrollment is active

columns.name: courserunenrollment_is_edx_enrolled
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the user is enrolled on edX platform. For edx.org course enrollment, it would always be true. Null for Bootcamps as it doesn't apply.

columns.name: courserungrade_grade
columns.description: float, course grade on edX.org or MITxOnline or xPro range from 0 to 1

columns.name: courserungrade_is_passing
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the user has passed the passing score set for this course on edX.org or MITxOnline or xPro

columns.name: line_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to ecommerce line table for fulfilled or refunded orders on the corresponding platform. For edX.org, it refers to line table in MicroMasters application.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to ecommerce order table for fulfilled or refunded orders on the corresponding platform. Note that this does not include orders from edX.org, for which we do not have data.

columns.name: order_reference_number
columns.description: string, order reference number to identify a fulfilled or refunded order on the corresponding platform, e.g. mitxonline-production-20

columns.name: coupon_code
columns.description: string, discount code for the redeemed coupon if applicable

columns.name: courserunenrollment_upgraded_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the learner upgraded to the verified track course mode. May be the same as the date when the course enrollment was created for xPro.

columns.name: user_company
columns.description: str, user's company pulled on the platform user enrolled. May be blank.

columns.name: user_country_code
columns.description: str, country code on the platform user enrolled. May be blank.

columns.name: user_email
columns.description: string, user email that user registered on the corresponding platform. May be null for some xPRO Emeritus learners.

columns.name: user_full_name
columns.description: str, user full name on the platform user enrolled.

columns.name: user_highest_education
columns.description: str, user's highest education on the platform user enrolled. May be blank.

columns.name: user_gender
columns.description: str, gender on the platform user enrolled

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: int, user ID on the corresponding platform. May be null for some xPRO Emeritus and Global Alumni learners.

columns.name: user_hashed_id
columns.description: str, foreign key to combined_users to identify the user

columns.name: user_username
columns.description: string, username to identify a user on the corresponding platform. Null for xPRO Emeritus and Global Alumni learners.

schema_snapshot.description: course enrollment detail with certificates, orders and coupons from OL platforms. No order data for edX.org course purchase.

columns.name: platform_name
columns.description: str, name of the platform

columns.name: program_id
columns.description: int, id representing a single program on a particular platform

columns.name: program_title
columns.description: str, title of the program, including the specific track if applicable. e.g., Statistics and Data Science (General Track)

columns.name: program_name
columns.description: str, name of the program. If program is split over multiple tracks, the program name is the same for all tracks. e.g. Data, Economics, and Design of Policy

columns.name: program_track
columns.description: str, name of the specific track for MicroMasters programs. For example, Statistics and Data Science program has multiple tracks - General Track, Methods Track, Social Sciences Track, and 'Time Series and Social Sciences Track'.

columns.name: program_type
columns.description: str,  the type of the program. Possible values are 'MicroMasters', 'XSeries' and 'Professional Certificate

columns.name: program_is_live
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the program is available to users on the MITxOnline website or MITxPro website

columns.name: program_readable_id
columns.description: str, readable ID from xpro or mitxonline formatted as program-v1:{org}+{program code} e.g.program-v1:xPRO+MLx

columns.name: user_hashed_id
columns.description: str, foreign key to combined_users to identify the user

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: int, user ID on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_email
columns.description: string, user's email on the corresponding platform. For a small number of legacy DEDP learners whose accounts cannot be linked to either edX.org or MITx Online based on their usernames, this will be learner's MicroMasters email.

columns.name: user_username
columns.description: string, username on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_full_name
columns.description: string, user full name on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_has_completed_program
columns.description: boolean, whether the learner has completed program to earn the certificate

columns.name: programenrollment_is_active
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the user is still enrolled in the program

columns.name: programenrollment_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when an enrollment was initially created

columns.name: programenrollment_enrollment_status
columns.description: str, enrollment status for users whose enrollment changed

columns.name: programcertificate_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, specifying when a certificate was initially created

columns.name: programcertificate_is_revoked
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the certificate is revoked and invalid

columns.name: programcertificate_uuid
columns.description: str, unique identifier for the program certificate

columns.name: programcertificate_url
columns.description: str, URL to the program certificate for users who earned the certificate on either mitxonline.mit.edu or xpro.mit.edu. Null for certificate earned on edX.org or certificates that have been revoked.

columns.name: unique_courses_taken_in_program
columns.description: int, count of unique course readable ids the learner enrolled in within that program

columns.name: capstone_indicator
columns.description: str, if the learner has taken a course with the word capstone in the title then it will be Y otherwise the value will be N

columns.name: program_completion_days
columns.description: int, number of days between the first course start date and the program completion certificate date

schema_snapshot.description: Mart model for program enrollments and certificates from different platforms

columns.name: platform
columns.description: str, application where data is from - MITx Online, xPro, or edX.org

columns.name: product_platform
columns.description: str, indicating the partners for course/program. The possible values are Emeritus, xPRO, Simplilearn, Global Alumni, WHU, Susskind, MITx Online, and edX.org

columns.name: product_readable_id
columns.description: str, unique open edX Course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag} or program run ID formatted as program-v1:{org}+{program code}+{run_tag} for MITx Online and xPro. For edX.org, the course ID is formatted as {org}/{course}/{run_tag}.

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: str, title of the course run or program run

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: int, primary key from ecommerce_product on MITx Online or xPro

columns.name: product_type
columns.description: str, either 'course run' or 'program run

columns.name: product_description
columns.description: str, product description

columns.name: list_price
columns.description: numeric, the latest list price for the product. Null for MITx Online programs and some MITx Online courses that have no normalized price.

columns.name: product_is_active
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the product is visible at the checkout page on MITx Online or xPro

columns.name: product_is_private
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the product is public or private. Public products are listed in the product drop-down on the bulk purchase form for xPro.

columns.name: product_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the product was created on MITx Online or xPro

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course or program starts

columns.name: end_date
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course or program ends

columns.name: enrollment_start
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course or program enrollment starts

columns.name: enrollment_end
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course or program enrollment ends

columns.name: upgrade_deadline
columns.description: timestamp, date and time beyond which the learner can not enroll in paid course mode. Only populated for MITx courses.

columns.name: duration
columns.description: str, a short description indicating how long the course or program takes to complete (e.g. '4 weeks')

columns.name: time_commitment
columns.description: str, short description indicating about the time commitments (e.g. '5-7 hours per week')

columns.name: certification_type
columns.description: str, either 'MicroMasters Credential' or 'Certificate of Completion' for MITx courses. 'Professional Certificate' for xPro courses.

columns.name: delivery
columns.description: str, 'Online' or 'Other' for xPro. 'Online' for MITx.

columns.name: continuing_education_credits
columns.description: str, number of continuing education units or credits offered. e.g. 4.5. NULL for MITx courses.

columns.name: pace
columns.description: str, 'Self-paced' or 'Instructor-paced

columns.name: topics
columns.description: str, list of topic names for a course.

columns.name: instructors
columns.description: str, list of instructor names for a course.

columns.name: offered_by
columns.description: str, 'MITx' or 'xPro

columns.name: is_live
columns.description: boolean, indicating whether the course/program page is set as live on MITx Online or xPro. Courses/Programs set as is_live=false are not listed on the catalog page.

schema_snapshot.description: combined course or program products from MITx Online, xPro, or edX.org

columns.name: platform
columns.description: str, open edx platform, e.g., MITx Online, edX.org, xPro, Residential MITx.

columns.name: courserun_readable_id
columns.description: str, the open edX course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag} for MITxOnline, xPro, Residential courses, {org}/{course}/{run_tag} for edX.org courses.

columns.name: user_username
columns.description: str, open edx username on the corresponding platform

columns.name: video_event_type
columns.description: str, type of this video event. The value is one of play_video, seek_video, pause_video, stop_video, complete_video.

columns.name: page_url
columns.description: str, url of the page the user was visiting when this video event was emitted.

columns.name: video_id
columns.description: str, hash code for the video being watched. This value is the last part of video_block_id string.

columns.name: video_edx_id
columns.description: str, the video ID on the open edx platform.

columns.name: video_title
columns.description: str, title of this video. Null for Residential MITx until we populate the course structure data.

columns.name: video_index
columns.description: int, sequence number giving order in which this block content appears within the course. Null for Residential MITx until we populate the course structure data.

columns.name: chapter_title
columns.description: str, title of chapter this video belongs to. Null for Residential MITx until we populate the course structure data.

columns.name: chapter_id
columns.description: str, block id of chapter within which this video belongs to.

columns.name: video_duration
columns.description: float, The length of the video file, in seconds. Populated with data from ODL Video Service (OVS) or tracking log. May be 0.0.

columns.name: video_currenttime
columns.description: number, The time in the video when this event was emitted. May be Null for seek_video

columns.name: video_old_time
columns.description: number, time in the video, in seconds, at which the user chose to go to a different point in time for 'seek_video' event

columns.name: video_new_time
columns.description: number, time in the video, in seconds, that the user selected as the destination point for 'seek_video' event

columns.name: video_event_timestamp
columns.description: timestamp, time of this video event

columns.name: user_hashed_id
columns.description: str, foreign key to combined_users to identify the user

columns.name: user_email
columns.description: str, user email on the corresponding platform

columns.name: user_country_code
columns.description: str, country code on the corresponding platform. May be blank.

columns.name: user_highest_education
columns.description: str, user's highest education on the corresponding platform. May be blank.

columns.name: user_gender
columns.description: str, gender on the corresponding platform

columns.name: courserun_title
columns.description: str, title of the course run

columns.name: course_readable_id
columns.description: str, Open edX ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code} for MITx Online, xPro or Residential courses, {org}/{course} for edX.org courses.

columns.name: courserun_start_on
columns.description: timestamp, datetime on when the course begins

columns.name: courserun_end_on
columns.description: timestamp, datetime on when the course ends

columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course run is currently running. True if courserun_start_on is in the past and blank courserun_end_on, or courserun_start_on is in the past and courserun_end_on is in the future.

columns.description: str, It's either 'correct' or 'incorrect

columns.name: problem_grade
columns.description: number, user grade for this problem at the time of this submission. It can range from 0 to the max possible grade for this problem. e.g. if problem_max_grade is 12, problem_grade can be anywhere between 0 to 12.

columns.name: platform
columns.description: str, name of the platform

columns.name: discount_code
columns.description: string, discount code for the redeemed coupon if applicable for example a marketing discount code like 'smartmitx25', a financial-assistance discount code like 'Lottery_2T2025cea95f1f-416e-4da6-a2de-ca1d669e7d00', or a sales discount code like 'B2B_AffiliateDiscount_2T2025ca0ad77b-b82b-4998-bd7b-6d944a360fc1

columns.name: discount_name
columns.description: string, human readable name for the discount

columns.name: discount_created_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the discount was initially created

columns.name: payment_transaction
columns.description: string, string that identifies the payment invoice for coupon purchases by companies

columns.name: discount_source
columns.description: string, one of "staff", "marketing", "purchase_order", "legacy", "financial-assistance", "sales", "customer-support". "staff" coupons are used to allow staff to enroll in courses. "marketing" coupons are promos for discounts generated by marketing. "purchase_order" and "sales" correspond to different ways that companies can pay for enrollment codes for their employees to enroll in courses or programs. The value will be 'b2b' for records sourced from b2b.

columns.name: discount_activated_on
columns.description: timestamp, activation timestamp

columns.name: discount_expires_on
columns.description: timestamp, expiration timestamp

columns.name: num_discount_codes
columns.description: int, number of discount objects associated with the payment version

columns.name: discount_max_redemptions
columns.description: int, maximum number of redemptions for the discount

columns.name: couponpayment_name
columns.description: string, human readable name for the coupon payment. This field is null for records from mitxonline.

columns.name: b2b_contract_number
columns.description: string, contract number used to identify the order

columns.name: b2breceipt_reference_number
columns.description: str, transaction reference number from cybersource payment

columns.name: redeemed
columns.description: boolean, set to true if the discount has at least one redeemed order otherwise it's false.

columns.name: discounts_used_count
columns.description: int, count of discounts used

columns.name: product_readable_id
columns.description: string, the product identifier either referring to courserun_readable_id, programrun_readable_id, or program_readable_id. Examples include course-v1:MITxPRO+TPMx_Mondelez+SPOC_R1 and program-v1:xPRO+SysEngx.

columns.name: discount_amount_text
columns.description: string, either dollar amount off, fixed price, or percentage discount.

columns.name: company_name
columns.description: string, company name

columns.name: discount_type
columns.description: string, one of 'single-use' or 'promo'. Promo coupon codes can be used multiple times. This will be null for records sourced from b2b.

columns.name: b2bcoupon_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to b2becommerce_b2bcoupon.

columns.name: discount_id
columns.description: int, foreign key referencing ecommerce_coupon from xpro or foreign key to ecommerce_discount for mitxonline. This will be null for records sourced from xpro b2b.

columns.name: couponpaymentversion_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to ecommerce_couponpaymentversion for orders that use a coupon

schema_snapshot.description: a table that includes coupon and enrollment codes from xpro and mitxonline

columns.name: course_short_id
columns.description: str, short unique identifier for the OCW course. e.g. 18.05-spring-2022

columns.name: course_name
columns.description: str, unique name of the OCW course. It appears as part of OCW Studio urls

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: str, title of the OCW course

columns.name: course_live_url
columns.description: str, url to the OCW course on production.

columns.name: course_is_live
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course website is currently published on OCW production.

columns.name: course_is_unpublished
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course website is currently unpublished on OCW production.

columns.name: course_has_never_published
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the course website has never been published on OCW production.

columns.name: course_first_published_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the course website was first published to OCW production

columns.name: course_publish_date_updated_on
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the publish date was most recently updated on OCW production. The publish date is updated by the webhook to Concourse pipeline (it rebuilds every site) whenever we do a release in ocw repos.

columns.name: course_term
columns.description: str, course term. Possible values are Spring, Summer, Fall, January IAP, or blank

columns.name: course_year
columns.description: int, course year

columns.name: course_level
columns.description: str, course level in comma-separated list. Possible values are Undergraduate , Graduate, Non-Credit, High School, or blank

columns.name: course_primary_course_number
columns.description: str, the primary course number e.g. 21A.850J

columns.name: course_extra_course_numbers
columns.description: str, the extra course number e.g. STS.484J

columns.name: course_department_numbers
columns.description: str, course department numbers in comma-separate list. e.g. STS, 8

columns.name: course_topics
columns.description: json, hierarchical course topics (topic, subtopic, speciality) in json format

columns.name: course_instructors
columns.description: str, course instructors in comma-separate list.

columns.name: course_learning_resource_types
columns.description:
str, course learning resource types or features in comma-separated
list. e.g. Lecture Notes, Problem Sets with Solutions...
Full list can be found at
https://github.com/mitodl/ocw-hugo-projects/blob/049c85e6544a36ba69a89602e5014f6085ef8831/ocw-course-v2/ocw-studio.yaml#L163-L207

columns.name: course_version
columns.description: str, version number of the course in the Split Modulestore when the grade was computed. Currently used for debugging purposes only.

columns.name: grading_policy_hash
columns.description: str, A SHA-1 digest of the course grading policy, used to detect and update grades whenever the policy changes

columns.name: percent_grade
columns.description: float, calculated course grade as a decimal percentage, per grading policy. e.g. 0.91 means 91%

columns.name: letter_grade
columns.description: str, calculated course grade as a letter value (e.g., A-D, Pass), per grading policy If the learner's grade is Fail or F, this value is empty.

columns.name: passed_timestamp
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the learner first passed the course. If this value is empty, the learner never passed the course. If this value is non-empty but the letter_grade value is empty, the learner transitioned from passing to not passing.

columns.name: course_edited_timestamp
columns.description: timestamp, last edited timestamp of the course when the grade was computed. Currently used for debugging purposes only.

columns.description: timestamp, date and time when this grade was initially created

columns.name: modified
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when this grade was most recently updated

columns.description: int, the auto-incremented ID for this table

columns.name: course_id
columns.description: str, Open edX Course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag}

columns.name: course_version
columns.description: str, The version number of the course in the Split Modulestore when the grade was computed. Currently used for debugging purposes only.

columns.name: usage_key
columns.description: str, block ID of the subsection (sequential) - foreign key to course_structure. e.g. block-v1:{org}+{course}+{run}type@{block type}+block@{hash code}

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to auth_user from open edX platform

columns.name: visibleblocks_hash
columns.description: str, SHA1 hash of visible blocks within the subsection - foreign key to grades_visibleblocks. This field might be useful for identifying whether the course content was the same for two grades.

columns.name: possible_all
columns.description: float, the aggregated "total_weighted_possible" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_possible" values of all (graded and ungraded) problems in the subsection.

columns.name: possible_graded
columns.description: float, The aggregated "total_weighted_possible" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_possible" values of all "graded" problems in the subsection.

columns.name: earned_all
columns.description: float, The user's aggregated "total_weighted_earned" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_earned" values of all (graded and ungraded) problems in the subsection.

columns.name: earned_graded
columns.description: float, The user's aggregated "total_weighted_earned" score in the subsection, calculated by summing all "weighted_earned" values of all "graded" problems in the subsection.

columns.name: first_attempted
columns.description: timestamp, time of the user's first attempt at a problem in the subsection.

columns.name: created
columns.description: timestamp, datetime of the subsection grade was first calculated for this user for this subsection.

columns.name: modified
columns.description: timestamp, datetime of the subsection grade was last updated for this user for this subsection. It will be updated every time the user attempts the problem.

columns.name: grade_id
columns.description: int, foreign key to grades_persistentsubsectiongrade

columns.name: possible_graded_override
columns.description: float, total score of all graded problems for the subsection

columns.name: earned_all_override
columns.description: float, total earned score (graded and ungraded) to be overridden.

columns.name: earned_graded_override

columns.name: username
columns.description: str, username of the open edX user who caused the event to be emitted. Some events are recorded with a blank username. This can occur when a user logs out, or the login session times out, while a browser window remains open. EdX recommends to ignore these events.

columns.name: context
columns.description: object, it includes member fields that provide contextual information. Common fields apply to all events are course_id, org_id, path, user_id. Other member fields for applicable events are course_user_tags, module.

columns.name: event_source
columns.description: str, specifies the source of the interaction that triggered the event. The possible values are - browser, server, task

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: str, type of event triggered. Values depend on event_source.

columns.name: name
columns.description: str, type of event triggered. When this field is present for an event, it supersedes the event_type field.

columns.name: event
columns.description: object, it includes member fields that identify specifics of each triggered event. Different member fields are supplied for different events.

columns.name: page
columns.description: str, url of the page the user was visiting when the event was emitted.

columns.name: session
columns.description: str, 32-character value to identify the user’s session. All browser events and the server 'enrollment' events include a session value. Other server events do not include a session value.

columns.name: ip
columns.description: str, IP address of the user who triggered the event

columns.name: host
columns.description: str, the site visited by the user, e.g., lms.mitx.mit.edu

columns.name: time
columns.description: str, time at which the event was emitted in YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS format

columns.name: agent
columns.description: str, browser agent string of the user who triggered the event.

columns.name: accept_language
columns.description: str, value from the HTTP Accept-Language request-header field

columns.name: referer
columns.description: str, URI from the HTTP Referer request-header field

columns.name: log_file
columns.description: str, internal used field for log file location

columns.name: _ab_source_file_url
columns.description: str, url path for the raw log file

columns.name: id
columns.description: str, primary key in courseware_studentmodule

columns.name: student_id
columns.description: str, reference user id in auth_user from open edX

columns.name: course_id
columns.description: str, Open edX Course ID in the format course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag}

columns.name: module_id
columns.description: str, block ID for a distinct piece of content in a course, referencing course_structure

columns.name: module_type
columns.description: str, category/type of the block, referencing course_structure.

columns.name: state
columns.description: str, JSON text indicating the learner's last known state within a course.

columns.name: done
columns.description: str, not used. The value is 'na' in every row

columns.name: grade
columns.description: str, floating point value indicating the total unweighted grade for this problem that the learner has scored. e.g. how many responses they got right within the problem. This data is also available in courseactivity_problemcheck

columns.name: max_grade
columns.description: str, floating point value indicating the total possible unweighted grade for this problem, or basically the number of responses that are in this problem. This data is also available in courseactivity_problemcheck

columns.name: created
columns.description: timestamp, datetime when this row was created, which is typically when the learner first accesses this piece of content.

columns.name: modified
columns.description: timestamp, datetime when this row was last updated. A change in this field implies that there was a state change.

columns.name: id
columns.description: int, primary key in edxval_video.

columns.name: edx_video_id
columns.description: str, video hashed ID.

columns.name: client_video_id
columns.description: str, human readable name for video. e.g. 14.310x_Lect9_Seg8_Final.mp4

columns.name: status
columns.description: str, values are external and imported.

columns.name: duration
columns.description: int, the length of the video, in seconds. Default to 0.0

columns.name: created
columns.description: timestamp, date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: id
columns.description: int, primary key in edxval_coursevideo.

columns.description: str, open edX Course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag}

columns.name: video_id
columns.description: int, foreign key in edxval_video

columns.name: is_hidden
columns.description: boolean, indicating if the video is hidden for the course.

columns.name: block_id
columns.description: str, Unique ID for a distinct piece of content in a course, formatted as block-v1:{org}+{course}+{run}type@{block type}+block@{hash code}

columns.name: block_index
columns.description: int, sequence number giving order in which this block content appears within the course

columns.name: block_parent
columns.description: str, parent block ID, same format as block_id field

columns.name: block_type
columns.description: str, category/type of the block, it identifies core structural elements of a course. Value includes but not limited to course, chapter, sequential, vertical, discussion, html, problem, video, etc.

columns.name: block_title
columns.description: str, title of the block extracted from the metadata field of the block. This field comes from name field for the section, subsection, or unit on the Studio 'Course Outline' page

columns.name: block_details
columns.description: str, json string of the block. It contains the attribute fields like category, children and metadata. Different block type may have different member fields inside metadata.

columns.name: course_id
columns.description: str, Open edX Course ID formatted as course-v1:{org}+{course code}+{run_tag}

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: str, title of the course extracted from the metadata field of 'course' block

columns.name: course_content_hash
columns.description: str, sha256 hashed string of the course content.

columns.name: block_content_hash
columns.description: str, sha256 hashed string of the block content in a course

columns.name: course_start
columns.description: timestamp, time indicating when the course starts, extracted from metadata of the 'course' block

columns.name: retrieved_at
columns.description: timestamp, time indicating when this block was initially retrieved from REST API.
